languages.text: "Можем ли мы побеседовать, как подобает благородным, прежде чем скрестим клинки?"

traits.locale_text: "Можем ли мы побеседовать, как подобает благородным, прежде чем скрестим клинки?"

languages.text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"
languages.original_text: "Можем ли мы побеседовать, как подобает благородным, прежде чем скрестим клинки?"

traits.locale_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"
"May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"
"May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

languages.text: “你我同为贵族出身，在我们刀剑相向之前，能先聊两句吗？”
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: “你我同为贵族出身，在我们刀剑相向之前，能先聊两句吗？”

languages.text: « Pouvons-nous discuter comme des personnes civilisées avant de croiser le fer ? »
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: « Pouvons-nous discuter comme des personnes civilisées avant de croiser le fer ? »

languages.text: "Kılıçlar çarpışmadan önce soylulara yaraşır şekilde konuşabilir miyiz?"
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: "Kılıçlar çarpışmadan önce soylulara yaraşır şekilde konuşabilir miyiz?"

languages.text: «¿Podemos dialogar, como corresponde a la nobleza, antes de cruzar nuestras armas?».
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Podemos dialogar, como corresponde a la nobleza, antes de cruzar nuestras armas?».

languages.text: "Können wir uns kurz unterhalten, wie es sich für Adelige gehört, ehe wir die Klingen kreuzen?"
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: "Können wir uns kurz unterhalten, wie es sich für Adelige gehört, ehe wir die Klingen kreuzen?"

languages.text: 貴種は、交戦する前に、会話を交わすのがふさわしい。
languages.original_text: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"

traits.locale_text: 貴種は、交戦する前に、会話を交わすのがふさわしい。
